data.description: Replace the current header nav links with the 8 new sections: Futurist Liberal Arts, Coliving, Campus, Political Club, Research Lab, Publication, Protocol, Events. These should link to the corresponding sections on the page.
data.title: Update header navigation with new section labels

data.description: Remove old section components (OriginStory, Projects, Vision, Directory, old Campus) and replace the page layout with the 8 new sections. Each section should be an anchor target matching the header nav.
data.title: Remove old sections and wire up new section layout

data.description: Complete the hero section design and content. The hero currently has the Fractal/Collective heading with Jacquard 24 font, a 3D fractal icosahedron, SVG skyline silhouette, and text shadow for readability. Finalize copy, layout, and visual polish.
data.title: Finish editing the hero section

data.description: Reposition hero section elements: (1) Move 'Fractal Collective' heading to top center. (2) Remove 'New York City' label. (3) Move 'In 2021...' paragraph to bottom left. (4) Move 'Explore our story' link to bottom right.
data.title: Rearrange hero section layout

data.description: New font hierarchy: (1) Jacquard 24 — only for the 'Fractal' logo/wordmark. (2) Instrument Serif — headers, section titles, headings. (3) JetBrains Mono — body text, everything else. Update CSS variables, Google Fonts imports, and component classes accordingly.
data.title: Update font hierarchy

data.description: Add illustrations and photos throughout the site — hero imagery, section visuals, and any other supporting graphics. Details TBD.
data.title: Add illustrations and photos

data.description:
Review and polish the hero section. Analyze the current screenshot for alignment issues, spacing, visual hierarchy, and overall layout. Key areas to address:

1. Navbar centering — the stacked 'Fractal Collective' title with pill buttons on either side has alignment issues (buttons appear off-center relative to title)
2. Skyline background opacity and positioning
3. 3D fractal object placement relative to the skyline
4. Bottom text (paragraph + 'Explore our story') spacing and alignment  
5. Overall visual hierarchy and spacing between elements
6. Responsive behavior at different viewport sizes
7. Font sizing and weight balance between Jacquard title, body text, and nav buttons

Reference: Monumental Labs hero layout (stacked title, flanked by nav)
data.title: Polish hero section layout and alignment
Update navbar and directory buttons to new labels
Add Mission button and change directory grid to 4x2
Create fractal geometry prototypes with Three.js and WebGL
Move project cards from Projects section into individual section pages
Build fractal animation for OriginStory section — single apartment dinner fractalizes into neighborhood campus
